case_title: SEBASTIAN EMILIANO ALVARENGA PENA VS. MOTORRAD LLC

DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) ERIC WIGHT (MANAGING MEMBER) FILED BY DEFENDANT MOTORRAD LLC DBA BMW MOTORCYCLES OF SAN FRANCISCO
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL [AGENT FOR SERVICE - STEVEN C WIGHT] FILED BY PLAINTIFF ALVARENGA PENA, SEBASTIAN EMILIANO AS TO DEFENDANT MOTORRAD LLC DBA BMW MOTORCYCLES OF SAN FRANCISCO

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF OCT-10-2023 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF OCT-10-2023 BY JUDGE PRO TEM ALLYSYN OVERTON. PLAINTIFF SEBASTIAN EMILIANO ALVARENGA PENA IS PRESENT AND IS ASSISTED BY SPANISH-LANGUAGE COURT INTERPRETER SHANNON RAINTREE (#300563). DEFENDANT MOTORRAD LLC DBA BWM MOTORCYCLES OF SAN FRANCISCO IS PRESENT, REPRESENTED BY ERIC WIGHT (MANAGING MEMBER). NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: ALLYSYN OVERTON; CLERK: S. KANE. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-10-2023 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ALVARENGA PENA, SEBASTIAN EMILIANO IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT MOTORRAD LLC DBA BMW MOTORCYCLES OF SAN FRANCISCO PLAINTIFF FAILS TO MEET HIS BURDEN OF PROOF. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
